companies.shortDescription:
en US | Mozilla - Internet for people, not profit (US) | We’re working to put control of the internet back in the hands of the people using it. | Welcome to Mozilla | Mozilla - Internet for people, not profit (US) | Help us improve your Mozilla experience | From trustworthy tech to policies that defend your digital rights, we put you first — always. | A stylized green flag on a black background, built from the ‘M’ for Mozilla and a pixel that is displaced to reference its original dinosaur logo. | A stylized green flag on a black background, built from the ‘M’ for Mozilla and a pixel that is displaced to reference its original dinosaur logo. | Break free from big tech — our products put you in control of a safer, more private internet experience. | Go chaos-free with one app for all your emails, calendars and contacts. | Keep your location and online adventures private — stream like a local, anywhere. | Get a heads-up if your personal info is at risk and lock it down like a pro. | Mask your email and phone number so you only get the messages you want. | Instantly create a beautiful website so you can grow your business. | Secure your AI by finding and fixing GenAI vulnerabilities before attackers do. | Reliably automate web tasks with a simple developer-focused API. | We’re proudly non-profit. Will you donate to Mozilla today? | Join the movement: AI for the people | Our mission is to make it easy for people to build with, and collaborate on, open-source, trustworthy AI. | Mozilla Data Collective is rebuilding the AI data ecosystem with communities at the center. | Join our new Open Source AI community.
products | Products: Mozilla’s products — Mozilla (US) — Mozilla | Mozilla’s family of products are all designed to keep you safer and smarter online | Products | Mozilla’s products — Mozilla (US) — Mozilla | Help us improve your Mozilla experience | Firefox is just the beginning. | Mozilla’s family of products are all designed to keep you safer and smarter online. | Get the browser that blocks 2000+ data trackers automatically. Enhanced Tracking Protection comes standard in every Firefox browser. | Firefox is no longer supported on Windows 8.1 and below. | Please download Firefox ESR (Extended Support Release) to use Firefox. | Firefox is no longer supported on macOS 10.14 and below. | Please download Firefox ESR (Extended Support Release) to use Firefox. | Protect your real email address to help control your inbox. | See if your personal information has been compromised in a corporate data breach, and sign up for future alerts. | Surf, stream and get work done on servers in over 30 countries for a secure internet connection with a new perspective. | Resources for developers, by developers. Support MDN and make it your own with collections, notifications, and playgrounds. | Access all your email, calendars, and contacts in one fast app. Filter and organize them the way you like. | Instantly create a beautiful website so you can grow your business. Connect and host your custom domain for free. | Connect your AI systems to a global community of security experts who uncover and help fix GenAI vulnerabilities early. | Connect your apps to the web with reliable automation and turn live web pages into clean, structured results. | Enter your email to create a Mozilla account.
